sourceSummary.oneLine: Apache License Version 2.0 terms and conditions for use, reproduction, and distribution.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines license terms for use, reproduction, distribution, contributions, redistribution notices, warranty disclaimer, and limitation of liability.
keyPoints: Grants a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license subject to the license terms.
Grants a patent license subject to stated conditions, with termination upon certain patent litigation.
Redistribution requires providing a copy of the license, marking changed files, retaining notices, and including NOTICE-file attributions where applicable.
The license disclaims warranties and limits contributor liability unless required by applicable law or agreed in writing.

entities.name: Licensor
entities.evidence: "Licensor" shall mean the copyright owner or entity authorized by the copyright owner that is granting the License.

entities.name: Contributor
entities.evidence: "Contributor" shall mean Licensor and any individual or Legal Entity on behalf of whom a Contribution has been received by Licensor and subsequently incorporated within the Work.

entities.name: Legal Entity
entities.evidence: "Legal Entity" shall mean the union of the acting entity and all other entities that control, are controlled by, or are under common control with that entity.

entities.name: Derivative Works
entities.evidence: "Derivative Works" shall mean any work, whether in Source or Object form, that is based on (or derived from) the Work.

concepts.name: Copyright license grant
concepts.evidence: each Contributor hereby grants to You a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license

concepts.name: Patent license grant
concepts.evidence: each Contributor hereby grants to You a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license

concepts.name: Redistribution conditions
concepts.evidence: You may reproduce and distribute copies of the Work or Derivative Works thereof in any medium, with or without modifications, and in Source or Object form, provided that You meet the following conditions

concepts.name: NOTICE file attribution
concepts.evidence: If the Work includes a "NOTICE" text file as part of its distribution, then any Derivative Works that You distribute must include a readable copy of the attribution notices

concepts.name: Warranty disclaimer
concepts.evidence: Licensor provides the Work (and each Contributor provides its Contributions) on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND

concepts.name: Limitation of liability
concepts.evidence: In no event and under no legal theory... shall any Contributor be liable to You for damages

concepts.name: Trademark restriction
concepts.evidence: This License does not grant permission to use the trade names, trademarks, service marks, or product names of the Licensor

evidence.claim: The document is Apache License Version 2.0 dated January 2004.
The document states terms and conditions for use, reproduction, and distribution.
evidence.evidenceText: TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR USE, REPRODUCTION, AND DISTRIBUTION

evidence.claim: The license grants a copyright license from each Contributor to the user subject to the terms and conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: Subject to the terms and conditions of this License, each Contributor hereby grants to You a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license

evidence.claim: The license grants a patent license from each Contributor to the user subject to the terms and conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: Subject to the terms and conditions of this License, each Contributor hereby grants to You a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license

evidence.claim: Patent licenses terminate if the user institutes certain patent litigation alleging infringement by the Work or a Contribution.
evidence.evidenceText: If You institute patent litigation against any entity... alleging that the Work or a Contribution incorporated within the Work constitutes direct or contributory patent infringement, then any patent licenses granted to You under this License for that Work shall terminate

evidence.claim: Redistribution is permitted in any medium, with or without modifications, and in Source or Object form, subject to stated conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: You may reproduce and distribute copies of the Work or Derivative Works thereof in any medium, with or without modifications, and in Source or Object form, provided that You meet the following conditions

evidence.claim: Redistribution requires giving recipients a copy of the license.
evidence.evidenceText: You must give any other recipients of the Work or Derivative Works a copy of this License

evidence.claim: Modified files must carry prominent notices stating that the files were changed.
evidence.evidenceText: You must cause any modified files to carry prominent notices stating that You changed the files

evidence.claim: Derivative Works distributed in Source form must retain applicable copyright, patent, trademark, and attribution notices.
evidence.evidenceText: You must retain, in the Source form of any Derivative Works that You distribute, all copyright, patent, trademark, and attribution notices from the Source form of the Work

evidence.claim: The license does not grant permission to use Licensor trade names, trademarks, service marks, or product names except for limited customary uses.
evidence.evidenceText: This License does not grant permission to use the trade names, trademarks, service marks, or product names of the Licensor, except as required for reasonable and customary use

evidence.claim: The Work and Contributions are provided on an AS IS basis without warranties or conditions of any kind unless required by law or agreed in writing.
evidence.evidenceText: Licensor provides the Work (and each Contributor provides its Contributions) on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND

evidence.claim: The license limits contributor liability for damages unless required by applicable law or agreed in writing.
evidence.evidenceText: In no event and under no legal theory... unless required by applicable law... or agreed to in writing, shall any Contributor be liable to You for damages

evidence.claim: The appendix provides boilerplate instructions for applying the Apache License to a work.
evidence.evidenceText: APPENDIX: How to apply the Apache License to your work.

reviewFlags.reason: No product models are identified in the source text.
The metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not identify FDA or any regulatory authority or jurisdiction.
The source text is a general software license, not an RA/regulatory guidance, approval, submission, or standard.
No document-specific copyright owner, licensed work name, or revision history beyond Version 2.0 and January 2004 is present.
